output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?firstLabel ?secondLabel ?thirdLabel WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?event WHERE {
      ?event wdt:P179 wd:Q1542651 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
    }
    ORDER BY DESC(?date)
    LIMIT 1
  }
  ?event p:P1344 ?firstStat .
  ?firstStat ps:P1344 ?first ; pq:P1352 wd:Q940149 .
  ?event p:P1344 ?secondStat .
  ?secondStat ps:P1344 ?second ; pq:P1352 wd:Q1249985 .
  ?event p:P1344 ?thirdStat .
  ?thirdStat ps:P1344 ?third ; pq:P1352 wd:Q940150 .
  ?first rdfs:label ?firstLabel .
  ?second rdfs:label ?secondLabel .
  ?third rdfs:label ?thirdLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?firstLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?secondLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?thirdLabel) = "en")
}
